meta.attribution: Data: MoRTH / Transport Research Wing — Road Accidents in India (2023, 2024). Boundaries: DataMeet, CC-BY.
meta.note: Severity = road deaths per 100 accidents (a rate: dangerous, not merely busy). Raw accident/death counts are NOT population- or vehicle-normalised — big states top count lists by size. Per-lakh and per-10,000-vehicle rates are a planned fast-follow (need state denominators).
